icon_list.text: Conducted a full UX and CRO audit
Analyzed user behavior with heatmaps & session recordings
Revamped color palette and typography for high visual appeal
Refined logo placement and hierarchy for mobile responsiveness
Created a brand style guide for future consistency
Built a responsive, speed-optimized Shopify store
Simplified product filtering, checkout flow, and mobile UI
Integrated Instagram shopping and UGC (user-generated content)
Added sticky cart & smart recommendations for upsells
SEO-rich product descriptions and category pages
Created conversion-driven copy for banners and CTAs

ekit_testimonial_data.review: They transformed our online presence completely. Traffic doubled, and leads tripled. A truly dedicated and creative team!
From branding to execution, everything was seamless. They treated our startup like their own. Absolutely Highly recommended!
We saw instant improvements in engagement and conversions. Smart, agile, and results-focused — exactly what we needed.
